---
title: "Clients"
description-meta: "openme client apps — CLI, iOS, Android, macOS menu-bar, Windows system-tray, and watchOS."
keywords: [openme client, openme iOS, openme Android, openme macOS, openme Windows, openme CLI, SPA client]
---

openme clients are available for every major platform.
Each client sends a 165-byte encrypted UDP knock packet to the server,
temporarily unlocking a firewall rule for your IP.

| Client | Platform | Type |
|--------|----------|------|
| [CLI](cli.qmd) | Linux · macOS · Windows | Command-line |
| [iOS](ios.qmd) | iPhone · iPad | Native app |
| [Android](android.qmd) | Android | Native app |
| [macOS](macos.qmd) | macOS | Menu-bar app |
| [Windows](windows.qmd) | Windows | System-tray app |
| [watchOS](watchos.qmd) | Apple Watch | Companion app |

All clients implement the same [SPA protocol](../protocol/packet-format.html)
and produce identical knock packets for the same inputs.

**New to openme?** Follow [Getting Started](../getting-started/index.qmd) first
to set up the server and send your first knock from the CLI.
